title: PARENTING AND LIFE SKILLS CLASSES - 211info
text: YOUNG ROOTS OREGON PARENTING AND LIFE SKILLS CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting and life skills courses for young parents to develop and grow knowledge and skills in creating healthy foundations for their family. Courses are taught by community professionals who are experts in the field of the topic. Childbirth classes are taught by Linn County Maternal Child Health Services nurses, parenting classes are taught by Parenting Success Network certified instructors, financial literacy and coaching are provided by Stand By Me nationally certified coaches, etc. Each household receives a $20 incentive for each class session they complete. Transportation and child care are provided. 1620 9th Street SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Pregnant and parenting individuals ages 13-24 years old. Older partners are invited to join as well. Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 990-4504 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 990-4504 Español (541) 203-3863 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more infomation FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Registration required, no further documentation requested. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-6pm. Respite Care: Monday-Thursday 1pm-6pm (subject to change during events). Services: Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT MENTORING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUNG ROOTS OREGON
